Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Statistics Standings Archived Stories Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

12 Carter Wilson

  • Class Freshman
  • Position Guard
  • Height 6-1
  • Hometown Bay Shore, N.Y.
  • High School Bay Shore
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats

Biography

2025-26
  • Came off the bench in nine games 
  • Made collegiate debut against Queens (NY) and scored his first collegiate points (11/14)
  • Scored a season-high six points against Staten Island (11/22)
  • Averaged 2.2 points per game, 1.1 rebounds per game, and .5 assists per game

At Bay Shore:
  • 2024 Newsday Suffolk County Player of the Year 
  • 2024, 2025 Newsday First Team All-Long Island
  • 2024 SCBCA Suffolk County Player of the Year
  • 2025 Fourth Team All-State
  • 2024, 2025 SCBA All-Sounty
  • 2024, 2025 SCBCA All-Conference
  • 2024, 2025 SCBCA All-League
  • 2023 CHSAA All-League
Personal:
  • Son of Jamaal Wilson and Kristin Reid
  • Exercise Science major

Wilson Career Highs
  • Points: 6, vs. Staten Island,11/22/25
  • Field Goals Made: 2, twice
  • 3-Point Field Goals Made: 2, vs. Staten Island,11/22/25
  • Free Throws Made: 1, vs. So. Conn. St., 11/19/25
  • Rebounds: 3, vs. Molloy, 11/16/25
  • Assists: 1, vs Chestnut Hill, 11/30/25
  • Blocks: N/A
  • Steals: 1, Multiple times
